steps.title: Find total length of the two equal sides
steps.content: Each equal side is 10 ft, so together they measure $$2 \times 10 = 20$$ feet.

steps.title: Subtract from the perimeter to get the third side
steps.content:
Perimeter is 36 ft, so the third side is $$36 - 20 = 16$$ feet.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
